title: Spicy Kadhai Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish originating from India, made with a variety of vegetables and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: Kadhai spices
ingredients.notes: available at most Indian grocery stores

instructions: Heat the xpide oil in a large kadhai or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the kadhai spices and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the snappy cadai and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add the bitter leaves and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until wilted.
Add the vine tomatoes and cook for 5-7 minutes, until they start to break down.
Season with salt to taste and serve over rice or with naan bread.
